data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices architecture to independently deploy and manage different services.
data.technical_spec: Distributed services, scalable, enables CI/CD pipelines.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A CDN is used to distribute audio content efficiently to global users.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes caching, edge servers, reduces latency.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Relational and NoSQL databases are deployed to handle user data and analytics.
data.technical_spec: PostgreSQL, Cassandra, designed for high availability and fault tolerance.

data.title: Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Spotify employs a combination of on-premises and cloud solutions to optimize performance.
data.technical_spec: AWS services, multi-region support, Kubernetes orchestration.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized management of APIs that serve as an entry point for clients.
data.technical_spec: Handles authentication, rate limiting, request routing.
